nfpa.label: NFPA 70E 2024
nfpa.description: National consensus standard for electrical safety in the workplace. Focuses on Arc Flash PPE Categories and formal safety boundaries.

ppe_categories.description: Arc-rated shirt & pants/coverall, face shield, leather gloves, hard hat
Arc-rated shirt & pants, arc flash suit, balaclava, rubber gloves, hard hat
Full arc flash suit, multi-layer system, Class E hard hat
Heaviest arc flash suit, voltage-rated gloves, maximum protection
De-energize before work. Work prohibited at this level.

boundaries.name: Limited Approach Boundary
boundaries.definition: Approach limit for unqualified persons. Escort required.

boundaries.name: Restricted Approach Boundary
boundaries.definition: Approach limit for qualified persons using PPE.

boundaries.name: Arc Flash Boundary
boundaries.definition: Distance where incident energy is 1.2 cal/cm².

loto_steps.title: Preparation
loto_steps.detail: Identify all energy sources and shut down equipment.

loto_steps.title: Isolation
loto_steps.detail: Physically isolate the equipment from all energy sources.

loto_steps.title: LOTO Application
loto_steps.detail: Apply individualized locks and tags to each disconnecting means.

loto_steps.title: Verification
loto_steps.detail: Verify zero energy state through testing (Tryout).

nfpa.qualified_person_def: One who has demonstrated skills and knowledge related to the construction and operation of electrical equipment and installations and has received safety training to identify the hazards and reduce the associated risks.

workplace.label: Workplace Standards
workplace.description: Facility-specific safety procedures including LOTOTO protocols and enhanced HECP (Hazardous Energy Control Program) requirements.

ppe_categories.description: Non-melting clothing, safety glasses, hearing protection
Arc-rated shirt and pants or coverall
Arc-rated shirt and pants, face shield, rubber gloves
Full arc flash suit and hood

boundaries.name: Restricted approach
boundaries.definition: Qualified personnel with specific task PPE.

loto_steps.title: Notify & Prepare
loto_steps.detail: Inform all associates and identify sources.

loto_steps.title: Isolate & Lock
loto_steps.detail: Apply RED Master Lock and laminated tag.

loto_steps.title: Release Stored Energy
loto_steps.detail: Ground, bleed, or block any residual energy.

loto_steps.title: TRYOUT
loto_steps.detail: Always verify isolation using start controls.

workplace.qualified_person_def: An associate who has been trained for the task and has demonstrated the ability to safely work on the specific machine or equipment per the HECP certification.
